title: Municipal and traffic court of New Orleans
doc_html:
CHAPTER 8. MUNICIPAL AND TRAFFIC COURT OF NEW ORLEANS

§2491. Municipal and traffic court of New Orleans

            There is created a "Municipal and Traffic Court of New Orleans".

            Acts 2014, No. 845, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2017.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 8.  MUNICIPAL AND TRAFFIC COURT OF NEW ORLEANS
§2491.  Municipal and traffic court of New Orleans
There is created a "Municipal and Traffic Court of New Orleans".
Acts 2014, No. 845, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2017.
